chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3501 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.14663/2021 2. For hearing of main case 24.01.2025 Mr. Taimoor Ahmed Qureshi, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Nadir Hussain advocate holds brief for Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that this petition assails show cause notice, however, the petitioner would not press this petition and respond to the show cause notice/s before the issuing authority. It is further sought that the notice be adjudicated vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity to petitioner to be heard, and pending adjudication no further coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for respondent / department has no cavil in such regard and states that the petition be disposed off in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
